'''Wraw''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service|Intelligence]] officer who was a part of Meloque's infiltration of [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]] in order to destroy the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[yammosk]]. He was also there to see if [[Alpha Red]] would work outside of a laboratory. He was characteristically sarcastic and butted heads with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] continually during the mission.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
